headlineSummary: The day’s sentiment leans negative for OpenAI on limited evidence, mixed-to-neutral for Anthropic with balanced praise and criticism, and positive for Google Gemini on limited evidence [E2][E1][E3].

ranking.summary: OpenAI drew negative sentiment on limited evidence, with criticism focused on an alleged shift toward ads, user-data gathering, and anti-consumer strategy [E2].
Anthropic had mixed neutral sentiment, with one comment sharply criticizing model personality and roleplay quality while another praised Claude 4.5 Opus as one of the world’s best models [E1][E3].
Google Gemini showed positive sentiment on limited evidence, helped by praise that called Gemini 3 one of the world’s best models [E3].

evidence.excerpt: My God those stabilized responses are sickening. If anthropic implements this, they'll kill their models' dominance in writing and roleplay. Opus 4.5 was already a step down in trying to play any character that didn't match its default personality

annotations.rationale: Explicitly names Anthropic and Opus 4.5, calling the responses 'sickening' and saying the models are already 'a step down' in writing and roleplay.

evidence.excerpt: It feels like OpenAI is moving into the extraction phase far too soon. They are making their product less appealing to end users with ads and aggressive user-data gathering (which is what this really is). Usually you have to be very secure in your position as a market segment owner before you start with the anti-consumer moves, but they are rapidly losing market share, and they have essentially no moat. Is the goal just to speed-run an IPO before they lose their position?

annotations.rationale: Directly criticizes OpenAI's strategy as 'extraction', 'anti-consumer', and driven by user-data gathering and IPO motives.

evidence.excerpt: the two best models in the world, Gemini 3 and Claude 4.5 Opus, were both trained on Google TPU clusters.

annotations.rationale: Calls Gemini 3 one of 'the two best models in the world,' which is strong praise of Gemini's quality.
Calls Claude 4.5 Opus one of 'the two best models in the world,' which is strong praise of Anthropic's model quality.
